sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109926" key="u(yhlofrone/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑψηλο-φρονέω</orth>, <sense id="n109926.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be high-minded,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ep.Rom.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.20</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg015.perseus-grc1:6:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">1 Ep.Ti.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
